summary: Frontend-only smoke test of Expo web preview at 414x896. All core flows verified: Dashboard loads with balance/stats/equivalencias; Clases FAB + bloque selection + save (1 clase created); Guardias FAB + modalidad Servicio + orden OR #074 + save (1 guardia created); Exportar shows correct table format (N.°, 06MAY2026, 1700h.-0800h./15h crono/20h pedag, '02h de Clases del 06MAY2026.' + 'TOTAL 02h pedagógicas.', Servicio + OR N.°074 del 06MAYO2026); Word export button visible; Dashboard updates correctly (saldo=18h = 20h capacity - 2h adeudado).

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warnings only: 'shadow*' style props and props.pointerEvents deprecated. Non-blocking.

action_items: Optional: migrate shadow* styles to boxShadow and pointerEvents to style.pointerEvents to silence RN web deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: compensation.ts logic is correct and handles splitting across guardias.
All interactive elements have testID as specified.
Storage uses AsyncStorage as per requirement; no backend calls.
Word export via docx library + expo-sharing looks correct (not triggered in automated run to avoid download dialog).
seed_data_creation: Created 1 clase (08:00-09:30, 2h pedag on today) + 1 guardia (Servicio, OR 074) via UI during automated smoke test. Data persists in browser AsyncStorage.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully local-storage. Use viewport 414x896. Key testIDs: abrir-nueva-clase, bloque-0..N, bloque-otro, guardar-clase, abrir-nueva-guardia, modalidad-guardia, modalidad-servicio, orden-OE/orden-OR/orden-OC, orden-numero, guardar-guardia, exportar-word, balance-saldo. Did not trigger actual .docx download to avoid browser download dialog; recommend manual verification of Word file content.
